title: Process Engineer Vacancy at NHPC - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at NHPC - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
NHPC is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Indore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About NHPC:
NHPC is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHPC!
